steps.t: The path to Stormwall is north-east of Skarháld. You should set out on the path to Stormwall, keeping an eye out for the five Zhélruka.
The path to Stormwall is north-east of Skarháld. You continue on the path to Stormwall, keeping an eye out for the missing Zhélruka.
